meta.source: Figma 'Living Room' page (Emerald Residence 107), frame 0:2, scale 1px = 1cm
meta.coords: x = Figma x, z = Figma y (plan view), y = up. All footprints are [x, z] of top-left corner in plan + [width, depth].
meta.assumed: All heights are assumed (not in Figma): ceiling 240, window sill 90 / height 120, doors 210 tall. Billy+Hemnes uses poc-plan dims 169x38 (Figma drew 160x30). TV stand uses label dims 188x39 (Figma drew 180x39).

walls.name: kitchen-west-stub
walls.note: connects TV wall to kitchen back wall

furniture.name: tv-samsung-frame
furniture.note: wall-mounted on north wall above TV stand

furniture.name: dining-table
furniture.note: ok to model as tabletop slab on 4 leg posts if trivial, else box

furniture.name: swivel-chair
furniture.note: round swivel chair: cylindrical base pedestal + round seat at 45 + curved/slab backrest to ~100, facing north-east toward TV

furniture.name: applaryd-sofa
furniture.note: L-shape, faces north (toward TV wall). Chaise on WEST end. Outline from Figma: main body x 494-816, z 609-702 (322x93); chaise x 494-585, z 540-702 (91x162). Heights: seat 47, back cushions to 82, arms ~65. Build as seat blocks + backrest slab along south edge + arm bolsters on both ends + chaise seat extension.

camera.name: couch-view
camera.note: seated on the sofa main seat, looking north at the TV wall
